channel.title: Dark Country Boy — New Releases
channel.description: Dark Country Boy — 70 albums of dark blues, outlaw country, and Southern Gothic Americana. Stream on Spotify and Apple Music.
channel.itunes:author: Dark Country Boy

item.title: Dark Country Boy — Fire in the Blood (Dark Blues & Dark Country)
item.description: Stream Fire in the Blood (Dark Blues & Dark Country) by Dark Country Boy on Apple Music and Spotify. Dark country and blues music.
